description: Percentage of evaluated risks classified as High or Critical
Average control gap score across all evaluated risks
purpose: Reflects control weakness across the environment

description: Number of Critical assets associated with High or Critical risks
purpose: Highlights concentration of risk around the most important assets

description: Percentage of risks for which the recommended treatment is Mitigate
purpose: Shows how much of the portfolio requires active remediation

description: Number of Critical risks still in Open status
Percentage of evaluated risks with Partial control coverage
purpose: Indicates how often controls exist but are not fully effective

description: Percentage of evaluated risks with a recorded final treatment decision
Percentage of logging-related risks with adequate AU-2/AU-6 coverage
Percentage of identity-related risks with adequate IA-2/AC-2 coverage
purpose: Shows strength of authentication and account governance

description: Percentage of backup/recovery-related risks with adequate CP-9/CP-10 coverage
